canonicalization: JSON.parse(proposal_raw.json) then recursive sorted-key, no-whitespace re-serialize (canon.mjs); proposal_canon.json is 12457 bytes UTF-8. sha256sum proposal_canon.json MUST equal seedHex.
drawRule: Take digest bytes left to right as unsigned ints b0..b7. Remaining = [F1..F26] in order. For draw k: pos = b_k mod remaining.length; pick remaining[pos] (0-indexed); remove it. Without replacement.
